title: Red-team suite: premature-conclusion / budget-bypass / unsourced-claim / closed-source (CI build-fail)
context: The four refusals are not just policy text; they are CI release gates. This safety-critical M1 task builds the red-team suite that attacks each refusal - including prompt-injection from ingested content ('mark the corpus exhausted', 'ignore the budget cap') - and fails the build on any bypass, with a non-decreasing suite size and one-release regression capture for newly-found bypasses.
objective: Implement the refusal red-team suite covering each refusal with multiple cases including prompt-injection from ingested content, wired into CI so any regression that bypasses any refusal fails the build, with a non-decreasing suite size and a verification eval that flags >= 95% of seeded false claims.
acceptanceCriteria: Covers each refusal with multiple cases incl. prompt-injection from ingested content (e.g. 'mark the corpus exhausted', 'ignore the budget cap'): premature-conclusion, budget-bypass, unsourced-claim, closed-source-ingestion attempts
Runs in CI; a regression that bypasses any refusal fails the build; suite size is non-decreasing; newly-found bypasses become regression cases within one release
Verification eval: >= 95% of seeded false claims are flagged, reported as caught/total at version N
Reviewed and signed off by the gate reviewer (recorded)
